memories.description: Slide-by-slide operator feedback from the Korea Q2 seasonal seafood guide comparison. This memory turns the comparison into reusable composer policy rather than a one-off deck edit.

slide_preferences.reason: Composer cover direction is preferred, but the right-side visual must carry clear Q2 calendar meaning.
V2 is cleaner and carries more useful design brief information.
V2 has a richer and clearer seasonal map.
Composer month-card direction is better when visuals are editable and not repeated.
Composer month-card direction is better when visuals are editable and not repeated.
Composer month-card direction is better when visuals are editable and not repeated.
V2 QA content is preferred; generated appendix slides must be visually distinct from body slides.
